title: New Dialysis Suite Commissioned
summary: A six-bed dialysis unit is now open, reducing travel time for renal patients in the SNNP Region, Ethiopia.

title: Sawla Midwives Receive National Award
summary: Our maternal health team was recognised for excellence in safe delivery practices at the Ethiopia Health Awards.

title: Community Health Outreach
summary: Mobile clinics screened over 2,000 residents for hypertension and diabetes during our annual outreach.

title: Community Health Outreach
summary: This healthcare quality exhibition will provide an opportunity for us to share our achievements, best practices, and future goals in healthcare quality. We explore innovative practices, success stories, and future initiatives from various departments. The healthcare system is a complex system made up of numerous interconnected processes, as everyone is aware. Applying a quality improvement effort also seems like a far-off dream because of how complicated healthcare systems are and how many obstacles we have to overcome. However, the quality improvement projects and best practices included in this healthcare quality bulletin are excellent examples of how our organization can achieve healthcare quality improvement when it recognizes the fundamental issues and starts the crucial task of resolving those issues one at a time using an improvement model. We need to know what works and what doesn't in a given issue area in order to utilize the limited resources for improvement as efficiently as possible. To implement proactive improvement techniques, we must think together and share knowledge with one another. Thus, we think that this healthcare quality bulletin exhibition will provide us with knowledge regarding what quality improvement project work and under what circumstances, allowing us to potentially modify them to fit our own environment. Let's keep raising the bar for the care we offer as a team.

title: Community Vaccination Drive
summary: Free vaccination for children under 5 held this weekend at the Sawla community centre.
